title: Campanula mentiens
taxonomy: Campanula mentiens is a species of flowering plant in the bellflower family, Campanulaceae. It is a member of the genus Campanula, which comprises over 500 species of flowering plants. Campanula mentiens is native to Europe and Asia, and is often found in mountainous regions and along streams. The plant is classified as a perennial, meaning it grows and blooms year after year. Campanula mentiens is typically found in areas with well-drained soil and partial shade.
